general.title: Election Announcement
general.description: ECI announces the official schedule for the Lok Sabha elections.

general.title: Model Code of Conduct
general.description: Guidelines for political parties and candidates come into effect.

general.title: Voter Registration Deadline
general.description: Last date for citizens to enroll or update details in the voter list.

general.title: Candidate Nomination
general.description: Candidates file their nomination papers and affidavits.

general.title: Campaign Period
general.description: Parties hold rallies, distribute manifestos, and seek votes.

general.title: Silence Period
general.description: All public campaigning must stop 48 hours before voting begins.

general.title: Polling Day
general.description: Voters cast their ballot using Electronic Voting Machines (EVMs).

general.title: Vote Counting
general.description: EVMs are opened and votes are tallied under strict supervision.

general.title: Results Declared
general.description: The final winners for each constituency are officially announced.

general.title: Primaries and Caucuses
general.description: States hold primary elections or caucuses to choose party delegates.

general.title: National Conventions
general.description: Parties officially nominate their Presidential and VP candidates.

general.title: General Election Campaign
general.description: Candidates debate and campaign across the country.

general.title: Election Day
general.description: Citizens vote for electors representing their chosen candidate.
details: First Tuesday after first Monday in Nov

general.title: Electoral College Vote
general.description: Electors meet in their states to officially cast votes for President.

general.title: Inauguration Day
general.description: The President-elect is sworn into office.
